hero.label: For Creators
hero.desc: Whether you have 800 followers or 800K, InfluencIA connects you with brands that value your authentic voice. No agents. No cold emails. Just real collaborations.
hero.no_min_desc: We welcome nano creators from 500 followers. Quality over quantity.

scoreCard.desc: Based on engagement, audience quality, content consistency, and past campaign results.

how.label: Your creator journey
how.title: From profile to paid — in four steps

steps.title: Build your profile
steps.desc: Link your Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, or Facebook. The AI calculates your IA Score automatically based on real platform data.

steps.title: Get discovered
steps.desc: Brands searching for creators in your niche see your profile. You'll also receive direct campaign invitations matched to your score.

steps.title: Apply and collaborate
steps.desc: Browse matching campaigns, submit a short proposal, and manage the full brief, review, and content submission workflow in one place.

steps.title: Get paid on time
steps.desc: Payments are held in escrow from day one. Once your content is approved, funds are released within 48 hours — every time.

iaScore.label: Your IA Score
iaScore.title: A score that tells the full story — not just follower count
iaScore.desc: Your IA Score is calculated from real platform data — engagement rate, audience authenticity, content quality signals, and verified past campaign results. It's updated in real time as you grow.

feed.label: Campaign feed
feed.title: Campaigns ranked by how well they fit you
feed.desc: Your feed surfaces campaigns based on your niche, score, platform, audience demographics, and past performance — not just budget. The best opportunities are always at the top.

platforms.label: Platforms
platforms.title: Link your accounts, all in one place
platforms.more: More platforms coming soon: LinkedIn, Pinterest, Snapchat

payments.label: Payments
payments.title: Get paid securely, every time
payments.desc: No more chasing brands for payment. Funds are held in escrow before the campaign starts.

items.title: Escrow protection
items.desc: Brands fund campaigns upfront. Your payment is guaranteed before you create.

items.title: 48h release
items.desc: Once content is approved, funds are released within 48 hours automatically.

items.title: Flexible withdrawal
items.desc: Withdraw to bank, mobile wallet, or receive a platform credit for tools.

cta.desc: Join 12,000+ creators who are building brand partnerships without agents, without begging, and without followers minimums.
